_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 3 regulatory_status values in allergens.json (eu_allergen, fda_major, eu_major). Lean schema — internal taxonomy ID surfaced in tap-to-explain only.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for allergen regulatory-classification labels.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/data/allergens.json `regulatory_status` field (17 entries; live: fda_major=9, eu_allergen=7, eu_major=1).

allergen_regulatory_statuses.name: FDA Major Allergen
allergen_regulatory_statuses.notes: Listed by the FDA as one of the 9 major food allergens (FALCPA + sesame addition 2023). Required to be declared on US labels.

allergen_regulatory_statuses.name: EU Major Allergen
allergen_regulatory_statuses.notes: Listed by the EU under Annex II of Regulation 1169/2011 as a major allergen requiring mandatory labeling.

allergen_regulatory_statuses.name: EU-Recognized Allergen
allergen_regulatory_statuses.notes: Recognized by EU regulators as an allergen requiring disclosure but not classified as a major allergen tier.
